name: Baba Ganoush
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Prick eggplant all over with a fork.
3. Bake whole until tender, about 30 minutes.
4. Remove from oven and halve the eggplant, scooping out the flesh.
5. Blend in a food processor with lemon juice until smooth.
6. Mash salt and garlic together and combine with the eggplant.
7. Add tahini and blend briefly.
8. Cool mixture and stir in parsley and pine nuts.
9. Before serving, drizzle with olive oil.
10. Serve as a dip with tortilla chips or triangles of flat (pita) bread.
